---
title: "wiki-refs-to-zotero — WebR pipeline smoke test"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
engine: knitr
filters:
  - webr
---

This document runs the **fetch → parse → dedup** pipeline entirely in the
browser via WebR.  It confirms that:

1. `fetch_wikitext()` (`download.file` + `jsonlite`, no httr2/curl) can reach
   the MediaWiki API from a browser context.
2. All pure-R parsing and deduplication functions work in WebR.
3. DOI/ISBN enrichment via `c2z` works (tested separately at the end; may be
   slow on first run while the package installs).

```{webr-r}
#| label: install
#| context: setup
webr::install(c("jsonlite", "htmltools", "dplyr", "purrr", "stringr", "stringi", "tibble"))
```

## 1. Define the pipeline functions

### 1a. fetch_wikitext (download.file — no httr2/curl in WASM)

```{webr-r}
#| label: fetch-fn
fetch_wikitext <- function(page_name, language = "en", project = "wikipedia") {
  # In WebR (WASM), curl/httr2 are non-functional; use download.file() which
  # WebR patches to use the browser's native fetch API (CORS-aware).
  params <- list(
    action        = "parse",
    page          = page_name,
    prop          = "wikitext",
    format        = "json",
    formatversion = "2",
    origin        = "*"
  )
  query <- paste(
    names(params),
    vapply(params, utils::URLencode, character(1L), reserved = TRUE),
    sep = "=", collapse = "&"
  )
  url_str <- paste0("https://", language, ".", project, ".org/w/api.php?", query)

  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
  download.file(url_str, tmp, quiet = TRUE)
  body <- jsonlite::fromJSON(tmp)

  if (!is.null(body$error))
    stop("MediaWiki API error (", body$error$code, "): ", body$error$info)

  body$parse$wikitext
}
```

### 1b. Template parser + citation extractor

```{webr-r}
#| label: parser-fns
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(stringi)
library(tibble)

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

find_template_end <- function(text, start) {
  n <- nchar(text); depth <- 0L; i <- start
  while (i <= n) {
    ch2 <- substr(text, i, i + 1L)
    if      (ch2 == "{{") { depth <- depth + 1L; i <- i + 2L }
    else if (ch2 == "}}") {
      depth <- depth - 1L
      if (depth == 0L) return(i + 1L)
      i <- i + 2L
    } else { i <- i + 1L }
  }
  NA_integer_
}

extract_templates <- function(text, pattern = "\\{\\{\\s*[Cc]ite\\s") {
  matches <- gregexpr(pattern, text, perl = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)[[1]]
  if (matches[1] == -1L) return(character(0))
  templates <- character(length(matches))
  for (idx in seq_along(matches)) {
    end_pos <- find_template_end(text, matches[idx])
    if (!is.na(end_pos))
      templates[idx] <- substr(text, matches[idx], end_pos)
  }
  templates[nzchar(templates)]
}

cite_patterns <- c(
  "cite book", "cite journal", "cite web", "cite news",
  "cite encyclopedia", "cite odnb", "cite magazine", "cite thesis",
  "cite conference", "cite report", "cite press release",
  "cite av media", "cite podcast", "cite speech", "harvc"
)

extract_all_citations <- function(wikitext) {
  pattern <- paste0(
    "\\{\\{\\s*(",
    paste(gsub(" ", "\\\\s+", cite_patterns), collapse = "|"),
    ")\\s*\\|"
  )
  extract_templates(wikitext, pattern)
}

parse_template_params <- function(template_str) {
  inner <- sub("^\\{\\{\\s*", "", template_str)
  inner <- sub("\\s*\\}\\}$", "", inner)
  chars <- strsplit(inner, "")[[1]]
  n <- length(chars)
  brace_depth <- 0L; bracket_depth <- 0L
  parts <- character(0); current <- ""
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    ch <- chars[i]
    ch_prev <- if (i > 1L) chars[i - 1L] else ""
    ch_next <- if (i < n) chars[i + 1L] else ""
    if      (ch == "{" && ch_next == "{") { brace_depth  <- brace_depth  + 1L; current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "{" && ch_prev == "{") {                                    current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "}" && ch_next == "}") { brace_depth  <- brace_depth  - 1L; current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "}" && ch_prev == "}") {                                    current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "[" && ch_next == "[") { bracket_depth <- bracket_depth + 1L; current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "[" && ch_prev == "[") {                                    current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "]" && ch_next == "]") { bracket_depth <- bracket_depth - 1L; current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "]" && ch_prev == "]") {                                    current <- paste0(current, ch)
    } else if (ch == "|" && brace_depth == 0L && bracket_depth == 0L) {
      parts <- c(parts, current); current <- ""
    } else { current <- paste0(current, ch) }
  }
  parts <- c(parts, current)
  template_name <- trimws(parts[1])
  result <- list(.template = tolower(template_name))
  unnamed_idx <- 1L
  for (p in parts[-1]) {
    p <- trimws(p); if (p == "") next
    eq_pos <- regexpr("=", p, fixed = TRUE)
    if (eq_pos > 0L) {
      result[[tolower(trimws(substr(p, 1L, eq_pos - 1L)))]] <-
        trimws(substr(p, eq_pos + 1L, nchar(p)))
    } else {
      result[[paste0(".unnamed_", unnamed_idx)]] <- p
      unnamed_idx <- unnamed_idx + 1L
    }
  }
  result
}

clean_wiki <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || !nzchar(trimws(x))) return(NA_character_)
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\{\\{!\\}\\}", "|")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\{\\{=\\}\\}", "=")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\{\\{[^|{}]+\\|[^|{}]+\\|([^|{}]+)(?:\\|[^{}]*)?\\}\\}", "\\1")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\{\\{[^|{}]+\\|([^|{}]+)\\}\\}", "\\1")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\{\\{[^{}]*\\}\\}", "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "\\[\\[([^\\]|]+\\|)?([^\\]]+)\\]\\]", "\\2")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "''", "")
  trimws(x)
}

template_to_itemtype <- function(tpl_name) {
  tpl <- tolower(trimws(tpl_name))
  dplyr::case_when(
    str_detect(tpl, "^(cite )?book$")  ~ "book",
    str_detect(tpl, "harvc")           ~ "bookSection",
    str_detect(tpl, "journal")         ~ "journalArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "web")             ~ "webpage",
    str_detect(tpl, "news")            ~ "newspaperArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "encyclopedia")    ~ "encyclopediaArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "odnb")            ~ "encyclopediaArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "magazine")        ~ "magazineArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "thesis")          ~ "thesis",
    str_detect(tpl, "conference")      ~ "conferencePaper",
    str_detect(tpl, "report")          ~ "report",
    str_detect(tpl, "press release")   ~ "newspaperArticle",
    str_detect(tpl, "av media")        ~ "videoRecording",
    TRUE                               ~ "document"
  )
}

extract_authors <- function(params) {
  authors <- tibble(creatorType = character(), lastName = character(), firstName = character())
  for (role_prefix in c("", "editor", "translator")) {
    creator_type <- if (role_prefix == "") "author" else role_prefix
    param_last   <- if (role_prefix == "") "last" else paste0(role_prefix, "-last")
    param_first  <- if (role_prefix == "") "first" else paste0(role_prefix, "-first")
    for (i in c("", as.character(1:10))) {
      lkey <- paste0(param_last, i); fkey <- paste0(param_first, i)
      last_val <- params[[lkey]]; first_val <- params[[fkey]] %||% ""
      if (!is.null(last_val) && nzchar(last_val))
        authors <- bind_rows(authors, tibble(
          creatorType = creator_type,
          lastName  = clean_wiki(last_val)  %||% "",
          firstName = clean_wiki(first_val) %||% ""
        ))
    }
    author_key <- if (role_prefix == "") "author" else role_prefix
    if (is.null(params[["last"]]) && is.null(params[["last1"]]) && !is.null(params[[author_key]])) {
      if (nrow(authors) == 0 || creator_type != "author") {
        val <- clean_wiki(params[[author_key]]) %||% params[[author_key]]
        if (str_detect(val, ",")) {
          parts <- str_split(val, ",\\s*", n = 2)[[1]]
          authors <- bind_rows(authors, tibble(creatorType = creator_type, lastName = parts[1], firstName = parts[2] %||% ""))
        } else {
          authors <- bind_rows(authors, tibble(creatorType = creator_type, lastName = val, firstName = ""))
        }
      }
    }
  }
  if (nrow(authors) == 0)
    authors <- tibble(creatorType = "author", lastName = "", firstName = "")
  authors
}

template_to_ref <- function(params) {
  item_type <- template_to_itemtype(params$.template)
  authors   <- extract_authors(params)
  na_coalesce <- function(...) { for (a in list(...)) if (!is.na(a)) return(a); NA_character_ }
  title <- na_coalesce(clean_wiki(params[["title"]]), clean_wiki(params[["script-title"]]))
  if (!is.na(title)) title <- str_remove(title, "^[a-z]{2}:")
  trans_title <- clean_wiki(params[["trans-title"]])
  if (!is.na(trans_title) && !is.na(title)) title <- paste0(title, " [", trans_title, "]")
  chapter <- na_coalesce(clean_wiki(params[["chapter"]]), clean_wiki(params[["script-chapter"]]))
  if (!is.na(chapter)) chapter <- str_remove(chapter, "^[a-z]{2}:")
  if (item_type == "bookSection" && is.na(title) && !is.na(chapter)) { title <- chapter; chapter <- NA_character_ }
  tibble(
    itemType         = item_type,
    title            = title %||% NA_character_,
    creators         = list(authors),
    date             = params[["date"]] %||% params[["year"]] %||% NA_character_,
    year             = { yr <- params[["year"]] %||% params[["date"]]; if (is.null(yr)) NA_character_ else str_extract(yr, "\\d{4}") %||% yr },
    publisher        = clean_wiki(params[["publisher"]]) %||% NA_character_,
    place            = clean_wiki(params[["location"]]) %||% NA_character_,
    publicationTitle = clean_wiki(params[["journal"]] %||% params[["website"]] %||% params[["work"]] %||% params[["newspaper"]]) %||% NA_character_,
    volume           = params[["volume"]] %||% NA_character_,
    issue            = params[["issue"]] %||% NA_character_,
    pages            = params[["pages"]] %||% params[["page"]] %||% params[["at"]] %||% NA_character_,
    ISBN             = params[["isbn"]] %||% NA_character_,
    ISSN             = params[["issn"]] %||% NA_character_,
    DOI              = params[["doi"]] %||% NA_character_,
    url              = params[["url"]] %||% NA_character_,
    language         = params[["language"]] %||% NA_character_,
    edition          = params[["edition"]] %||% NA_character_,
    series           = clean_wiki(params[["series"]]) %||% NA_character_,
    accessDate       = params[["access-date"]] %||% NA_character_,
    bookTitle        = if (item_type == "bookSection") clean_wiki(params[["in"]]) %||% NA_character_ else NA_character_,
    chapter          = chapter %||% NA_character_,
    .template_name   = params$.template,
    .raw_template    = NA_character_
  )
}

extract_refs_from_wikitext <- function(wikitext) {
  cite_strings <- extract_all_citations(wikitext)
  if (length(cite_strings) == 0) { warning("No citation templates found."); return(tibble()) }
  parsed <- map(cite_strings, parse_template_params)
  refs   <- map2_dfr(parsed, cite_strings, function(p, raw) {
    r <- template_to_ref(p); r$.raw_template <- raw; r
  })
  refs |>
    mutate(first_author = map_chr(creators, function(cr) {
      if (nrow(cr) == 0) return(NA_character_)
      last  <- cr$lastName[1]  %||% ""; first <- cr$firstName[1] %||% ""
      if (!nzchar(last) && !nzchar(first)) return(NA_character_)
      if (nzchar(first)) paste0(last, ", ", first) else last
    }), .before = creators)
}

dedup_key <- function(title, year, last1) {
  norm <- function(x) { x <- tolower(x %||% ""); x <- stri_trans_general(x, "Latin-ASCII"); str_replace_all(x, "[^a-z0-9 ]", ""); trimws(x) }
  paste(norm(last1), norm(year), norm(title), sep = "|")
}

deduplicate_refs <- function(refs) {
  refs |>
    mutate(.last1 = map_chr(creators, ~ .x$lastName[1]),
           .dedup_key = dedup_key(title, year, .last1)) |>
    group_by(.dedup_key) |>
    mutate(n_citations = n()) |>
    slice(1) |>
    ungroup()
}

cat("All pipeline functions loaded.\n")
```

## 2. Smoke test: fetch → parse → dedup

```{webr-r}
#| label: smoke-test
cat("Fetching wikitext for 'Meiō_incident'...\n")
wikitext <- fetch_wikitext("Meiō_incident")
cat("Fetched", nchar(wikitext), "characters.\n\n")

cat("Extracting citations...\n")
refs_raw <- extract_refs_from_wikitext(wikitext)
cat("Found", nrow(refs_raw), "citation templates.\n\n")

cat("Deduplicating...\n")
refs <- deduplicate_refs(refs_raw)
cat("Unique references:", nrow(refs), "\n\n")

cat("Type breakdown:\n")
print(dplyr::count(refs, itemType, sort = TRUE))

cat("\nFirst 5 titles:\n")
print(refs$title[1:5])

cat("\nSMOKE TEST PASSED ✓\n")
```

## 3. Export as RIS

Serialises the deduplicated references to RIS format and triggers a browser
download.  No additional packages are required beyond those already loaded.

```{webr-r}
#| label: ris-export
itemtype_to_ris <- function(it) {
  switch(it,
    book = "BOOK", bookSection = "CHAP", journalArticle = "JOUR",
    webpage = "ELEC", newspaperArticle = "NEWS", encyclopediaArticle = "ENCYC",
    magazineArticle = "MGZN", thesis = "THES", conferencePaper = "CONF",
    report = "RPRT", videoRecording = "VIDEO", document = "GEN", "GEN"
  )
}

ref_to_ris_lines <- function(row) {
  lines <- character(0)
  add <- function(tag, val) {
    if (!is.na(val) && nzchar(val))
      lines <<- c(lines, paste0(tag, "  - ", val))
  }
  add("TY", itemtype_to_ris(row$itemType))
  add("TI", row$title)
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(row$creators[[1]]))) {
    cr <- row$creators[[1]][i, ]
    name <- if (nzchar(cr$firstName)) paste0(cr$lastName, ", ", cr$firstName) else cr$lastName
    tag  <- switch(cr$creatorType, editor = "ED", translator = "A3", "AU")
    if (nzchar(name)) add(tag, name)
  }
  add("PY", row$year)
  add("DA", row$date)
  add("PB", row$publisher)
  add("CY", row$place)
  add("JO", row$publicationTitle)
  add("T2", row$publicationTitle)
  add("VL", row$volume)
  add("IS", row$issue)
  if (!is.na(row$pages)) {
    pg <- str_split(row$pages, "[–—-]", n = 2)[[1]]
    add("SP", trimws(pg[1]))
    if (length(pg) > 1) add("EP", trimws(pg[2]))
  }
  add("SN", row$ISBN)
  add("SN", row$ISSN)
  add("DO", row$DOI)
  add("UR", row$url)
  add("LA", row$language)
  add("ET", row$edition)
  add("T3", row$series)
  add("Y2", row$accessDate)
  if (row$itemType == "bookSection") {
    add("BT", row$bookTitle)
    add("T2", row$chapter)
  }
  c(lines, "ER  - ")
}

# Build RIS text
all_lines <- character(0)
for (i in seq_len(nrow(refs))) {
  all_lines <- c(all_lines, ref_to_ris_lines(refs[i, ]), "")
}
ris_content <- paste(all_lines, collapse = "\n")

# Render a clickable download link as HTML output.
# base64-encode via jsonlite (already loaded) to avoid any URI-encoding issues.
ris_b64 <- jsonlite::base64_enc(charToRaw(ris_content))
href <- paste0("data:application/x-research-info-systems;base64,", ris_b64)

library(htmltools)
browsable(tags$a(
  href     = href,
  download = "references.ris",
  style    = paste0("display:inline-block;padding:6px 14px;margin:6px 0;",
                    "background:#198754;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;",
                    "text-decoration:none;font-size:14px"),
  paste0("\u2b07 Download references.ris (", nrow(refs), " references)")
))
```
